action: Re-teach Fertilization before revisiting IVF. Use a short video and a labelled diagram.
Conduct a revision activity on Metamorphosis using the frog lifecycle chart.
Use diagram-based exercises on the male and female reproductive system.
Run a 15-minute recap of Internal Fertilization with worked examples and a quick exit quiz.
